commit_scope: The mesh-vs-SOTA learning-rate measuring stick: a sample-efficiency experiment that runs the body's own Form-native learner (form/form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk on the Go kernel) on a real public corpus (LibriSpeech, CC-BY-4.0) and places its curve beside published SOTA TTS/STT training endpoints. extract_fingerprints.py is the carrier (ffmpeg+numpy) that turns .flac into the coarse quantized log-mel fingerprint the Form learner eats; run_curve.py drives nearest-shape over growing sample counts and records accuracy vs samples; run_8h_accumulation.py is the live long run (corpus channel + a say->whisper loopback channel of 10 distinct macOS voices as learnable classes), launched via launch_8h.sh. sota_reference.md distills two cited web-research sweeps; comparison.md holds the honest slope-vs-ceiling reading and is updated to point at the now-built transformer backward pass. Recognition runs in Form; only feature extraction and orchestration are carrier, authored last.

local_validation.summary: Static sample-efficiency curve measured on LibriSpeech dev-clean (40 speakers, 813 held-out utterances): the Form nearest-shape learner climbs from chance (2.7% at 1 sample) to 54.1% at 1890 samples, all 40 speakers covered and ~38% by sample 128. Each new speaker is learned from its first exemplar (O(1), zero backprop). The 8-hour live-accumulation run was launched and verified healthy through its first cycles: corpus channel (LibriSpeech train-clean-100, 251 speakers) + a live say->whisper-large-v3 loopback channel; the STT half is proven live (whisper transcribed the macOS say output). The router-tier accuracy plateaus at its honest coarse-feature ceiling (~61% over the mixed 301-speaker space). Honest framing in comparison.md: this is the router-tier floor; the fidelity gap to SOTA closes through the transformer tier (transformer-block.fk forward + transformer-backprop.fk backward), not a learner we lack.

observed_delta.stt_loopback: whisper-large-v3-turbo transcribed macOS say output live
observed_delta.conditions: LibriSpeech CC-BY-4.0 (dev-clean + train-clean-100) mounted locally; Go form-kernel for nearest-shape; ffmpeg+numpy feature carrier; macOS say + whisper-cli for the live channel

known_limitations.limitation: The router tier (nearest-shape, exact-bin Hamming on a coarse 13-band quantized log-mel fingerprint) is an instance-based memorizer: steep early per-sample slope, low absolute ceiling (~54% on 40-way speaker ID). It is not, and is not claimed to be, SOTA-competitive on fidelity.
known_limitations.follow_up: Fidelity lives in the transformer tier (transformer-block.fk + transformer-backprop.fk), trained via the cross-train-oracle loop; this experiment is the measuring stick that makes the gap a measured distance.

known_limitations.limitation: Feature extraction and the run orchestration are Python carrier (host-IO audio decode + measurement loop), authored last; only the learning (nearest-shape) is Form. The corpus is mounted locally and gitignored (reproducible artifact, not source).
known_limitations.follow_up: As the substrate's audio front-end (mel-frame.fk) and the transformer tier mature, more of the pipeline moves Form-native; the carrier shrinks.

ci_validation.summary: Experiment carrier + docs under experiments/; no form band, route, or service change. The referenced Form learner (nearest-shape.fk) is already proven three-way in the default suite.

deploy_validation.summary: Local research experiment; no deploy surface. Rides normal merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: New capability: a reproducible instrument that measures the body's own learning rate on a real speech task against published SOTA endpoints, with a live 8-hour mesh/oracle/satsang accumulation run.
test_flows: extract_fingerprints.py -> run_curve.py produces the sample-efficiency curve JSONL
launch_8h.sh -> run_8h_accumulation.py writes learning_curve.jsonl over an 8-hour window
e2e_validation.summary: Measured on real LibriSpeech audio; the Form learner runs, the curve is recorded, the live loopback channel proven.

phase_gate.gate: the body's learning is measured on a real corpus against cited SOTA endpoints, slope-vs-ceiling named honestly, the router-tier floor distinguished from the transformer tier
phase_gate.next: run the cross-train-oracle loop over the transformer tier (forward + backward now both built) and read the native-vs-oracle score rise against the SOTA reference
